name: French Bread Extraordinaire!
recipeIngredient: 2 tsp Red Star Brand Active Dry Yeast
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the dough ingredients in a bread pan. Select the Dough setting, and press Start.
When the dough cycle ends, the machine will beep. Set a timer for an additional hour to allow the dough to rise. Open the machine, punch down the dough, set another timer, and let it rise for another hour while still in the machine. Turn off the bread machine, remove the bread pan, and turn out the dough onto a lightly floured countertop or cutting board. Form into a smooth round ball, then flatten it with your hands.
2. Place a clean kitchen towel (not terry cloth) in a round wicker basket that is at least twice the size of the dough. Dust the towel liberally with flour. Place the round dough in the center of the basket. Place the basket in a warm place and let the dough rise, uncovered, for about 45 minutes until it doubles in size.
3. Gently turn the dough out of the basket upside down onto a greased baking sheet. With a very sharp knife held almost parallel to the loaf, carefully slash the top of the dough at sharp angles in an X pattern.
4. Preheat the oven to 450°F. Place a small pan on the floor or bottom shelf of the oven and carefully add at least 1 cup boiling water to the pan. Place the dough in the oven and bake for 20 minutes. Remove from the oven and place on a cake rack to cool for 1 hour before slicing.
5. To preserve the crisp crust, do not store the bread in plastic wrap or bag. The bread can be loosely covered or left out for up to two days before it dries out completely.
